positive: A whimsical and sophisticated composition of a crescent moon cradling a glowing, ethereal forest scene. The foreground features stylized, bioluminescent flora, such as luminous fern fronds and exaggerated, smooth mushrooms, rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and emerald green. The central structure is a stylized mountain range silhouetted against a gradient sunset sky that transitions from dusty rose pink to warm lavender. Use a highly decorative, ornate style inspired by Art Nouveau and celestial cartography. Strong contrast is achieved by emphasizing the glowing elements (key light) against the dark silhouettes. Composition should be centered and suitable for repeat or single placement on apparel. Clean vector-art feel with painterly depth, hyper-detailed, high contrast, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, low resolution, bad anatomy, mutated, ugly, noisy, out of focus, grain, jpeg artifacts
